title: Cyphra project configuration
description: Paths and provider for the Cyphra CLI and libraries. See https://www.cyphra.dev/configuration

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor validation (optional).

provider.description: Graph database provider (only neo4j is supported today).

schema.description: Path to the .cyphra schema file, relative to cyphra.json.

migrations.description: Path to the migrations directory (string), or Prisma-style { "path": "..." }, relative to cyphra.json.

datasource.description: Optional Prisma-style datasource block (provider and optional connection hints).
